subject: math
activity_templates: A 5th-grade multi-digit multiplication worksheet. 6 problems in stacked column form (3-digit x 2-digit, e.g. '234 x 45'). Clear workspace for partial products. Header reads 'Multi-Digit Multiplication'. {{character}} gives a thumbs up.
A 5th-grade decimal multiplication worksheet. 8 problems (e.g. '2.4 x 0.6', '1.25 x 3'). 2x4 grid, each problem stacked with workspace. {{character}} holds a pencil.
A 5th-grade multiplication word-problem worksheet with 4 multi-step kid-friendly problems (some with decimals) with workspace and answer box. {{character}} reads.
A 5th-grade 'powers of 10' multiplication worksheet. 8 problems (e.g. '3.2 x 10 = __', '0.54 x 100 = __'). 2x4 grid. {{character}} points at the first.
